title: Gridbadger: Live Skyline Dodge
objective: Survive a 2-4 minute takeover rush by swiping between open grid lanes, avoiding lock-ins and cursor strikes, and banking score before the skyline is fully claimed or you get trapped.

controls.outcome: The gridbadger hops to the next rooftop lane to avoid incoming cursors and closing tiles.

controls.input: Swipe up through a glowing hot lane
controls.outcome: You cross a rising-price takeover lane for bonus points and combo gain if you clear it before it locks.

controls.input: Hold still on a safe dim tile for a brief beat
controls.outcome: Your current live multiplier converts into secured score, but you stop earning peak-risk bonuses.

steps: Start on the center rooftop tile of a scrolling skyline grid.
Rival live cursors streak in and begin flipping tiles from safe to claimed.
Swipe lane to lane to stay on open tiles as takeover waves speed up.
Cross glowing hot-price lanes just before they lock to raise your multiplier.
Every few seconds, a Live Flip pulse reverses one marked row or column, turning recent danger into safety and safe space into a fresh trap.
Miss a dodge, get boxed in by claimed tiles, or get hit by a cursor sweep and the run ends.
scoring: Score rises from survival time and each hot tile crossed. Consecutive hot-lane cuts build a live multiplier, but the multiplier only fully pays out when you bank it on a safe tile; getting hit loses the unbanked bonus. A
tips: Watch the ghost cursors, not just the tiles; their path shows which lanes will become unsafe next.
Hot lanes are worth the most right before lock, but waiting too long can leave no escape route.
Use each Live Flip pulse to reposition aggressively, because one lane always changes from bad to safe.
Bank medium combos often if the grid is getting crowded; greedy runs die fast.

trendContext.title: GridBadger - A live multiplayer pixel grid where every pixel can be flipped, prices rise with each takeover, and you can see everyone's cursors
